candidate_summary: 3-tier pipeline: Tier 1 raw LLM generation r_raw; Tier 2 interpreter-LLM rewrites to r_interp + flags ambiguities; Tier 3 council of K judge-LLMs deliberates over r_interp → consensus r_final. Question-class routing personal-Q vs government-Q with different tier-2 rubrics. Inspired by Tibetan Nechung Oracle.
content_words: deity Pehar Dorje Drakden trance possession
tier-1 raw + tier-2 interpret + tier-3 consensus

results.name: llm-council Map-Reduce Pipeline
results.rationale: Tier-3 judge council with consensus directly mirrors map-reduce ensemble+consensus pipeline.

results.name: Multi-Agent Debate LLM Judges Stability
results.rationale: Council deliberation among K judge-LLMs aligns with multi-agent debate-based judging.

results.name: Beyond LLM-as-Judge Multi-LLM Framework
results.rationale: Multi-LLM judging framework overlaps with K judge-LLM council tier.

results.name: Multi-Dimensional Grammatical Eval 2605.07635
results.rationale: Grammatical multi-dimensional scoring single-task; lacks tiered pipeline.

results.name: Agent-as-Judge 2508.02994
results.rationale: Agent-as-judge paradigm shares judge-LLM tier-3 mechanism.

results.name: Multi-Turn Dialogue Evaluator Multiple Judges 2508.00454
results.rationale: Multiple-judge evaluator over staged dialogue matches K-judge consensus tier.

results.name: Rubric-Based LLM-as-Judge Methodologies
results.rationale: Question-class routing with personal-Q vs government-Q rubrics is rubric-based judging design.

results.name: Awesome LLMs-as-Judges Survey
results.rationale: Survey catalogs council/consensus + rubric-routing + multi-stage judge pipelines.

decision_rationale: 7 of 8 prior art hits. llm-council, Multi-Agent Debate, Multi-Turn Multiple Judges, and Rubric-Based all cross all three thresholds. Multi-tier LLM evaluation with judge council + rubric routing fully covered. Verdict: FAIL.
